snapshots.purpose: Resume the passing Adam/Eve Stage 2 state near the transition to Stage 3 for focused Stage 3/4 repair loops.

Verify Stage 3 Need Mapping and Stage 4 Strategic Repair behavior after the remaining Stage 2 context-share step
